description_long: This barn features a classic rectangular structure with a prominent gable roof supported by a visible wooden truss system. The roof is partially covered with wooden slats, revealing the internal framework and open rafters. The exterior walls are constructed from a uniform, gray brick pattern, giving the barn a sturdy and utilitarian appearance. There are minimal exterior openings, with no visible windows and only a single, narrow vertical door on one side. The interior is spacious and open, designed for storage or housing livestock, with ample headroom provided by the high-pitched roof. The overall design is functional, emphasizing structural integrity and simplicity typical of agricultural outbuildings.
description: A rectangular barn with a gable roof, exposed wooden trusses, and gray brick walls, featuring a single narrow door and no visible windows.
description_view_0: End view showing the gable roof peak and solid brick wall with no visible openings.
description_view_1: Side cutaway view revealing the internal wooden truss structure and open roof framework.
description_view_2: Opposite end view with a gable roof and a single narrow vertical door visible on the brick wall.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the full length of the barn, the repetitive truss system, and the open roof structure.
